projection_claim.description: Contracting T^{ab} W_c V^c with delta_{am} delta_{bn} yields T^{mn} W_c V^c

global_claim.description: T^{ab} * W_c * V^c is a rank-2 tensor field over spacetime

distinction_verification.reason: The projection claim involves a specific index contraction with a Kronecker delta, producing a scalar. The global claim asserts the tensor nature of the full expression without any projection. These are mathematically distinct statements.

notes: The projection relation (contract with deltas -> scalar) is mathematically distinct from the global tensor relation (rank-2 tensor field). The audit confirms these should not be conflated.
